description: Phase 4 — Stability Pool UI: Build the earn view for depositing, withdrawing, and claiming rewards from the Stability Pool

userStories.title: Create earn view container
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the Stability Pool overview with my position and pool statistics so I can understand my earnings.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/earn/earn-view.tsx`
Header: 'Stability Pool' title + description text explaining the pool
Pool stats section: total deposits from `useStabilityPoolStats(debtToken.symbol)`, formatted in debt token currency using `formatDebtAmount`

User position section (when connected + has deposit): current deposit, collateral gain (USDm from liquidations) formatted with `formatCollateralAmount`, yield gain (debt token rewards) formatted with `formatDebtAmount`
Data from `useStabilityPool(debtToken.symbol, address)` — returns `{ deposit, collateralGain, debtTokenGain } | null`
Pool share calculation: `userDeposit / totalDeposits * 100` — display as percentage with 2 decimal places (use Number conversion for display math since these are bigints)
Shows deposit and withdraw action areas as placeholder divs (wired in US-005)
'Back to Dashboard' button that sets `borrowViewAtom` to `"dashboard"` via `useSetAtom(borrowViewAtom)`
Not-connected state: prompt to connect wallet (check `address` from `useAccount()`)
Empty state (no deposit): show CTA encouraging first deposit
Uses Card layout from @repo/ui consistent with other borrow views (Card > CardHeader > CardTitle, CardContent)
Get `debtToken` from `useAtomValue(selectedDebtTokenAtom)` — it holds a DebtTokenConfig object, use `debtToken.symbol` for hook calls
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create deposit form
userStories.description: As a user, I want to deposit debt tokens into the Stability Pool to earn rewards from liquidations.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/earn/deposit-form.tsx`
Debt token amount input — controlled `value: string` state with onChange handler

Wallet balance display using `useReadContract({ address: tokenAddress, abi: erc20Abi, functionName: 'balanceOf', args: [userAddress] })` — get token address via `getTokenAddress(chainId, debtToken.symbol as TokenSymbol)` from `@mento-protocol/mento-sdk`
Max button to fill input with formatted wallet balance (`formatUnits(balance, 18)`)
'Claim rewards' checkbox — controls `doClaim` state (default: `true` if user has pending rewards i.e. `collateralGain > 0n || debtTokenGain > 0n`, else `false`)
Shows pending rewards summary when `doClaim` is checked: collateral gain (USDm) with `formatCollateralAmount` and yield gain (debt token) with `formatDebtAmount`
'Deposit' submit button with disabled states: wallet not connected, amount empty, amount exceeds balance, `spDeposit.isPending`

On submit: calls `spDeposit.mutate({ symbol: debtToken.symbol, amount: parseUnits(inputValue, 18), doClaim, wagmiConfig, account: address })` — get wagmiConfig from `useConfig()`, address from `useAccount()`
Uses `useSpDeposit()` hook from `@repo/web3` — two-step flow handled internally (allowance check + approve + deposit)
Flow dialog shows deposit progress automatically via `borrowFlowAtom`
Accepts props: `{ deposit: bigint | null, collateralGain: bigint | null, debtTokenGain: bigint | null }`
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create withdraw form
userStories.description: As a user, I want to withdraw my deposit from the Stability Pool, optionally claiming accumulated rewards.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/earn/withdraw-form.tsx`
Amount input — controlled `value: string` state, max = current deposit balance from props
Max button to fill with current deposit (`formatUnits(deposit, 18)`)
'Claim rewards' checkbox — controls `doClaim` state (default: `true`)
Shows pending rewards summary when `doClaim` is checked: collateral gain and yield gain formatted appropriately
'Withdraw' submit button with disabled states: wallet not connected, amount empty, amount exceeds deposit, `spWithdraw.isPending`
On submit: calls `spWithdraw.mutate({ symbol: debtToken.symbol, amount: parseUnits(inputValue, 18), doClaim, wagmiConfig, account: address })`
Uses `useSpWithdraw()` hook from `@repo/web3` — single-step flow (no approval needed)
Flow dialog shows withdraw progress automatically
Accepts props: `{ deposit: bigint | null, collateralGain: bigint | null, debtTokenGain: bigint | null }`
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create claim rewards action
userStories.description: As a user, I want to claim my accumulated rewards (collateral gains + yield) without depositing or withdrawing.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/earn/claim-rewards.tsx`
Shows pending rewards: collateral gain (USDm) formatted with `formatCollateralAmount`, yield gain (debt token) formatted with `formatDebtAmount`
'Claim Rewards' button — only visible when user has non-zero rewards (`collateralGain > 0n || debtTokenGain > 0n`)
On click: calls `spWithdraw.mutate({ symbol: debtToken.symbol, amount: 0n, doClaim: true, wagmiConfig, account: address })` — withdraw 0 triggers claim-only
Button disabled when: wallet not connected, no rewards, `spWithdraw.isPending`
Component hidden entirely when no rewards to claim (both gains are 0n or null)
Accepts props: `{ collateralGain: bigint | null, debtTokenGain: bigint | null }`
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Wire earn view into borrow-view with all forms
userStories.description: As a user, I want to navigate to the Stability Pool from the dashboard and use deposit, withdraw, and claim features.
acceptanceCriteria: Update `apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/borrow-view.tsx` — replace earn placeholder `<div>` with `<EarnView />`
Import EarnView from `./earn/earn-view`

Update `earn-view.tsx` to compose: pool stats, user position, `DepositForm`, `WithdrawForm`, `ClaimRewards` — use Tabs from @repo/ui (Tabs > TabsList > TabsTrigger + TabsContent) with 'Deposit' and 'Withdraw' tabs
Pass SP position data (`deposit`, `collateralGain`, `debtTokenGain`) from `useStabilityPool` to child form components
ClaimRewards component rendered outside tabs (always visible when rewards exist)
Verify: clicking 'Earn' on stability-card in dashboard navigates to earn view
Verify: 'Back to Dashboard' button returns to dashboard view
Verify: deposit, withdraw, and claim actions trigger flow dialog
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
